decision.reason: The GCP adapter renders and executes SQL quality checks with BigQuery evidence, generates deterministic Dataplex DataScan create plus execution/readback command artifacts, and has live native DataScan execution/readback evidence for a 10,000-row target. It also renders deterministic native Dataplex Data Lineage publication/readback plans and Dataplex aspect taxonomy/apply/readback plans, exposes an explicit adapter-owned command surface, and now has real-account native lineage event readback plus Knowledge Catalog/Dataplex aspect modifyEntry/readback evidence against the same bronze-to-gold target table.
decision.planner_behavior: Treat Dataplex data-quality execution/readback and explicit Dataplex lineage/aspect execution/readback as validated when the adapter-owned command is used. Do not treat SQL quality evidence, injected-client command tests or BigQuery job metadata as native Dataplex lineage parity. Automatic native lineage/aspect emission for every contract run remains a separate future integration choice.

required_before_promotion: Decide whether native Dataplex lineage/aspect emission should be automatic in normal contract runs or remain an explicit command.
Add production-sized or multi-contract native lineage/aspect validation if these surfaces become part of default runtime execution.
Keep aspect schema evolution additive because Dataplex AspectType field indexes are immutable.
acceptance: Stable-final GCP claims can rely on SQL quality evidence, native Dataplex data-quality execution/readback evidence, deterministic native lineage/aspect planning artifacts and the explicit non-mutating-by-default command surface. Native Dataplex lineage event publication/readback and Knowledge Catalog/Dataplex aspect modifyEntry/readback are validated for the explicit command path; automatic emission during every contract run remains outside the scoped claim.
